headline: Hubbell: Robust Markets, But High Valuation And Margin Concerns Create Some Headwinds
summary: Hubbell (HUBB) Q1 shows 8% organic growth and synergistic M&A (NSI) lifting margins, but rich valuation limits upside. See more details here.
